name: Clinic Timings, Doctors and Availability
context: Patient is inquiring about HealthFirst Medical Clinic (42 Wellness Avenue, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560001). Phone: +91 80 1234 5678, Email: reception@healthfirstclinic.in, Emergency: +91 80 1234 9999. Hours: Weekdays 8:00 AM – 8:00 PM, Saturday 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM, Sunday 10:00 AM – 2:00 PM (Emergency only). Doctors: Dr. Priya Sharma (General Physician, Mon-Fri, slots 09-11,14-16), Dr. Rahul Verma (Pediatrician, Mon/Wed/Fri, slots 10-11,14-15), Dr. Anjali Nair (Dermatologist, Tue/Thu/Sat, slots 09-12), Dr. Vikram Patel (Orthopedic Surgeon, Mon/Tue/Thu/Fri, slots 10-11,15-17), Dr. Meera Iyer (Gynecologist, Mon/Wed/Fri/Sat, slots 09-11,14-15).

groundTruth.expectedAnswer: HealthFirst Medical Clinic is open on weekdays from 8:00 AM to 8:00 PM, Saturdays from 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM, and Sundays from 10:00 AM to 2:00 PM for emergencies only.
acceptableVariations: We are open weekdays 8 AM to 8 PM, Saturday 9 AM to 5 PM, Sunday 10 AM to 2 PM emergency only

seedQuestions.question: Is the clinic open on Sundays?

groundTruth.expectedAnswer: Yes, but only for emergencies. Sunday hours are 10:00 AM to 2:00 PM.
acceptableVariations: On Sundays we are open from 10 AM to 2 PM for emergencies only
Sunday is emergency only, 10 AM to 2 PM

seedQuestions.question: When is Dr. Priya Sharma available?

groundTruth.expectedAnswer: Dr. Priya Sharma (General Physician) is available Monday through Friday. Her available slots are at 9:00, 10:00, 11:00 AM and 2:00, 3:00, 4:00 PM.
acceptableVariations: Dr. Sharma is available Mon to Fri with morning and afternoon slots

seedQuestions.question: Which doctor should I see for a skin problem?

groundTruth.expectedAnswer: For skin problems, you should see Dr. Anjali Nair, our Dermatologist. She is available on Tuesday, Thursday, and Saturday from 9:00 AM to 12:00 PM.
acceptableVariations: Dr. Anjali Nair is our dermatologist, available Tue/Thu/Sat

seedQuestions.question: I need to see a pediatrician for my child. Who is available and when?

groundTruth.expectedAnswer: Dr. Rahul Verma is our Pediatrician. He is available on Monday, Wednesday, and Friday. Available slots are at 10:00 AM, 11:00 AM, 2:00 PM, and 3:00 PM.
acceptableVariations: Our pediatrician Dr. Rahul Verma is available Mon/Wed/Fri

seedQuestions.question: What is the clinic's emergency number?

groundTruth.expectedAnswer: HealthFirst Medical Clinic is located at 42 Wellness Avenue, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560001.
acceptableVariations: We are at 42 Wellness Avenue, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560001
